page8_timeline.text: President Trump was safely evacuated from the White House Correspondents Association dinner on Saturday night following an armed security incident where a suspect was taken into custody after a brief confrontation.

page8_topic: The 2026 'Super Saturday' of record-shattering T20 cricket scores and successful chases marks a historic shift in the sport, raising fundamental questions about the future of bowling in the format.

MARKETS: NVIDIA reaches unprecedented $5 trillion market valuation, driven by intense AI infrastructure demand.
Indian stock markets (Sensex, Nifty) experience heightened volatility due to rising crude oil prices and foreign institutional investor (FII) outflows.
Global markets react cautiously to the ongoing Middle East conflict and its impact on energy transit through the Strait of Hormuz.
IT sector in India faces significant drag following weak Q4 results and underwhelming guidance from major players like HCL Tech.
Investors closely track the upcoming US Federal Reserve policy decisions for cues on inflation and interest rate trajectories.
AMD market capitalization surpasses $500 billion for the first time, signaling competition in the AI chip sector.
Foreign investors have net-sold approximately ₹56,363 crore in Indian equities during April 2026.
Crude oil prices remain elevated, fluctuating due to uncertainty surrounding supply lines and geopolitical tensions.
Renewed optimism in the semiconductor sector boosts broader market sentiment despite regulatory concerns.
The Mag Seven earnings calendar is highlighted as a critical driver for global market sentiment in the coming week.
TRADE_TECH: NVIDIA hits $5 trillion valuation, solidifying its position as the world's most valuable company amid AI boom.
Draft US rules propose stringent export controls requiring Commerce Department approval for global AI chip shipments.
Pentagon classifies Anthropic as a 'supply chain risk,' marking a rare designation for a domestic AI tech company.
Google's in-house TPU processors ('Ironwood') emerge as a potential long-term competitor to NVIDIA's dominance.
Environmental scrutiny of Big Tech intensifies, with protests targeting Nvidia's data center environmental impact.
Stellantis signs a major AI partnership deal with Microsoft to accelerate automotive tech integration.
Concerns over 'agentic' AI applications drive massive capital expenditure plans by hyperscalers.
Global data center buildouts face potential delays due to bureaucratic bottlenecks and proposed export restrictions.
AI-linked crypto tokens experience volatility in response to US regulatory news and chip export policy shifts.
Industry debate continues over the environmental cost of AI, specifically regarding Scope 3 emissions in the chip supply chain.
WORLD: President Trump evacuated during a security incident at the White House Correspondents Association dinner; suspect in custody.
Fragile US-Iran ceasefire agreement holds, but tension remains high over control of the Strait of Hormuz.
Israel continues military operations in Lebanon despite the broader US-backed ceasefire deal.
Hungarian election sees a defeat for the incumbent party amid record voter turnout.
Conflict in the Middle East continues to cause spikes in crude oil prices, impacting global energy security.
US officials discuss diplomatic de-escalation strategies regarding Iran while maintaining a firm stance on SoH transit.
Russian and Ukrainian forces exchange 350 prisoners of war as an Easter truce tentatively holds.
International Energy Agency continues to manage the release of emergency reserves to combat energy supply shocks.
Global supply chains remain vulnerable to geopolitical confrontations, particularly those affecting energy transit routes.
US election-year political rhetoric intensifies, with President Trump's foreign policy stances shaping international relations.
INDIA: Government allocates record ₹12.2 trillion for infrastructure spending in the 2026-27 Union Budget.
India's cumulative installed wind power capacity crosses the 56 GW milestone.
Finance Ministry announces an 'Infrastructure Risk Guarantee Fund' to provide partial credit guarantees for large projects.
Mumbai intensifies its largest-ever infrastructure push, involving new metro lines, expressways, and airport developments.
RBI maintains interest rates, highlighting upside risks to inflation linked to oil prices and weather patterns.
National Waterways development is accelerated to improve logistics connectivity in mineral-rich industrial regions.
India records its highest-ever annual wind energy capacity addition of 6.05 GW in FY 2025-26.
New incentives are introduced to indigenize the manufacturing of seaplanes and high-value construction machinery.
Logistics policy focuses on increasing the share of inland waterways and coastal shipping from 6% to 12% by 2047.
Support for mega textile parks and biosimilars production is expanded to bolster domestic manufacturing capabilities.
MISC: KL Rahul hits a record 152* off 67 balls, the highest IPL score by an Indian player.
Punjab Kings successfully chase 265, setting a new world record for the highest successful T20 chase.
Sanju Samson's wicketkeeping skills draw comparisons to MS Dhoni in a recent IPL match.
Record-breaking run-fest sees 986 runs scored in a single Saturday of IPL action.
Sai Sudharsan leads Gujarat Titans to victory over Chennai Super Kings with a crucial 87-run knock.
Vaibhav Suryavanshi recognized as the youngest player to score 1,000 runs in T20 cricket.
IPL media rights value remains a topic of industry confidence despite consolidation in the media market.
Virat Kohli becomes the first batter to hit 800 boundaries and the third to hit 300 sixes in IPL history.
Lungi Ngidi hospitalized following a heavy fall during an IPL match, raising concerns about player welfare.
India selected as one of 12 countries for a new FIFA Women's Development Programme.
sections.LIVE_UPDATE: President Trump was safely evacuated from the White House Correspondents Association dinner on Saturday night following an armed security incident where a suspect was taken into custody after a brief confrontation.
sections.NEW_TOPIC: The 2026 'Super Saturday' of record-shattering T20 cricket scores and successful chases marks a historic shift in the sport, raising fundamental questions about the future of bowling in the format.
